# mtncloud_role (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud role by name (authority).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing role by name (authority).
data "mtncloud_role" "operators" {
  name = "operators"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name (authority) of the role to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the role.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the role.
- `role_type` (String) Role type.
